description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a large balcony with glass railing above the main entrance, and a mix of white and light brown exterior finishes. The ground floor includes a main door and a large garage door, both set into a recessed entryway. The upper floor has a wide expanse of windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The sides and rear of the house are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The roof area includes a partially open terrace and some visible rooftop structures, likely for utilities or HVAC.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a glass balcony, large windows on the upper floor, and a mix of white and brown finishes. The front features a main door and garage, while the sides and rear are mostly solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, glass balcony, and large upper windows.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid wall and minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, windowless wall and visible rooftop structures.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a solid wall and minimal openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on upper floor, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with adjacent garage, no porch, and a glass balcony above
